full_text:
Xiahou De 夏侯德
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou De (夏侯德). Dismissed Huang Zhong for seeking battle. Slain by Yan Yan at Tiandang mountain. Xiahou De is a fictional character. Xiahou De was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xiahou De lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
